products.name: Ceremonial Grade Matcha — 30 g Tin
products.description:
First-harvest, stone-ground ceremonial matcha from Uji, Kyoto. Vibrant jade colour, naturally sweet and umami-forward — meant to be whisked with water rather than blended into milk.

Ships in an airtight tin to keep it fresh.

products.name: Bamboo Whisk (Chasen) — 80 Prongs
products.description: Hand-cut from a single piece of Japanese bamboo. The 80-prong head whips matcha into a smooth, frothy crema in seconds. Pair with a whisk holder to keep the prongs in shape between uses.

products.name: Bamboo Scoop (Chashaku)
products.description: The traditional curved bamboo scoop used in Japanese tea ceremony. One scoop holds roughly 1 g of matcha — the standard dose for a single bowl.

products.name: Matcha Latte Cup — 250 ml
products.description: Smooth porcelain cup sized for a generous double-shot matcha latte. Comfortable handle, dishwasher safe, and it stacks neatly on the saucer.

products.name: Handcrafted Chawan (Matcha Bowl)
products.description:
Wide, hand-thrown stoneware bowl in the traditional Japanese style. The shallow profile gives the chasen room to move; the textured interior helps emulsify the matcha cleanly.

Each piece is unique — small variations in glaze and form are part of the character.

products.name: Cast Iron Tetsubin Kettle — 1.2 L
products.description: Traditional Japanese cast iron kettle, enamel-lined to keep the inside rust-free and your water clean-tasting. Holds heat beautifully and pours without dripping — a centrepiece for any tea bar.
